name: add-session-table-variant
task: Add DuckDB caching for the get_analyst_ratings tool. Create a session_analyst_ratings table with columns for ticker, firm, rating, target_price, previous_target, date, and action (upgrade/downgrade/initiate).
assertions: A CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS session_analyst_ratings statement is added with the specified columns plus _tool_call_id and _fetched_at
A cacheAnalystRatings() function is created that iterates over parsed rows and inserts them with parameterized queries
The function uses safeNum() for numeric fields (target_price, previous_target) and safeStr() for string fields (ticker, firm, rating, action)
TOOL_CACHE_MAP includes an entry for 'get_analyst_ratings' pointing to the new cache function and 'session_analyst_ratings' table name
The cacheToolResult() switch statement includes a case for 'get_analyst_ratings' calling the new function
